name: Imatinib
description: BCR-ABL tyrosine kinase inhibitor used in chronic myeloid leukemia.

name: Dasatinib
description: Second-generation BCR-ABL inhibitor for resistant cases.

name: Nilotinib
description: Second-line therapy with high target specificity.

name: Trastuzumab
description: HER2-directed monoclonal antibody for breast cancer.

name: Pertuzumab
description: HER2 dimerization inhibitor used in combination regimens.

name: Lapatinib
description: Small-molecule HER2/EGFR inhibitor for advanced disease.

name: Gefitinib
description: First-generation EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitor for NSCLC.

name: Erlotinib
description: EGFR inhibitor for advanced non-small cell lung cancer.

name: Osimertinib
description: Third-generation EGFR inhibitor with improved target selectivity.

name: Vemurafenib
description: BRAF V600E inhibitor for metastatic melanoma.

name: Dabrafenib
description: Selective BRAF inhibitor for melanoma with target mutation.
